title: Dump your Wii U games
requirements: A Wii U already running Aroma
An SD card with enough free space for the game (a microSD with an adapter is fine)
Optionally a USB HDD to install the game to (a Y-cable may be needed)
warnings: It is !!ILLEGAL!! to share the files you dump with this guide. They are for personal backups of games you own.
Formatting a USB drive on the Wii U erases everything on it.
_note: Transcribed from wiiu.hacks.guide/dump-games. Files are downloaded by hand from the linked sources.

steps.title: Before you start
steps.body: This backs up a disc or installed game to your SD card using **wudd**, then optionally re-installs it to your console or a USB drive with **WUP Installer GX2**. You need **Aroma** already installed.

steps.title: Put the tools on your SD card
steps.body: Graphite downloads the latest **WUP Installer GX2** and **wudd** and copies both onto your SD card. Just press the button and wait.

steps.title: Dump the game with wudd
steps.body:
1. Power on and boot into **Aroma**. If dumping a disc game, insert the disc.
2. Launch **wudd** from the Wii U Menu.
3. Select **Dump partition as .app**.
4. Select the **Game** partition.
5. Wait for it to finish, then exit wudd.

Your dump is saved to `sd:/wudump/WUP-X-XXXX` on the card.

steps.title: Move the dump into an install folder
steps.body:
Take the SD card to your computer.

1. Create a folder called `install` at the root of the SD card (if it doesn't exist).
2. Move the `GMXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX` folder from `sd:/wudump/WUP-X-XXXX` into that `install` folder.

Put the card back in the Wii U.

steps.title: Install the game (optional)
steps.body:
If you just wanted the backup files, you can stop here. To install the game onto the console or a USB drive:

1. Open **WUP Installer GX2**.
2. Select your game, press **Install**, confirm with **Yes**.
3. Choose the destination: **USB** or **NAND**. (NAND isn't recommended because the internal storage is small.)
4. Exit to the Wii U Menu, and the game now appears installed and ready to play.

steps.title: Clean up
steps.body: Once the game is installed and working, take the SD card back to your computer and delete the `GMXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX` folder from the `install` directory to free up space.

steps.title: You're done
steps.body: Your game is backed up (and optionally installed). Keep the dumped files to yourself; sharing them is !!illegal!!.
